author: Domekologe
name: NekoAPI
short: Shows anime images from NekosAPI with a rating filter.
description: Fetches images and GIFs from https://nekosapi.com with rating support (safe, suggestive, borderline, explicit). Explicit is only allowed in NSFW channels.
install_msg: Thanks for installing NekoAPI! Use !nekoapi or /nekoapi.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-guild rating settings only. It does not store any personal user data.
